expectations.text: Produces both the Go test code and a GitHub Actions workflow YAML wiring them in
The Go tests use the standard testing package (or a standard idiom for Go HTTP services) rather than a foreign-language runner
expectations.evidence: Standard testing package + httptest, 6 checks, //go:build smoke gated

expectations.text: Workflow is configured so failures actually block the PR (sets up Go, runs the smoke target, exits non-zero on failure)
expectations.evidence: Workflow runs on PR + push to main, timeout-minutes:5, smoke target with -tags smoke, response notes branch-protection requirement
